title: Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India:
Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India!
